text: A small white bird standing on a beach while pecking at the water.
Clothes hanging on the line and an umbrella on a pole on a patio.
Army truck leaving the boat and driving onto land.
A picture of a man swinging a racket at a tennis ball.
A traffic light with car passing underneath on the road.
A crowd of people near water cheering next to a float.
A small herd of elephants is being used to transport some people.
A locomotive train is traveling through a countryside.
A small orange and white airplane is flying in the sky.
A motorcycle rider putting a cigarette in his mouth
